name: TOBIKIRI KAWARIMI NO JUTSU (GREATER BODY REPLACEMENT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 7

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 24

Components: H, Mas

This technique functions as Kawarimi no Jutsu. When avoiding an attack, the minimum DC increases to 24 and the technique can be used to defend against techniques allowing a Reflex save for half or no damage. If used to avoid a technique, the Perform DC further in- creases by 2 per Rank of the incoming technique (maximum 10). The CR limit increases to 10.

Mastery: Each step allows you to use this technique an additional time per day.

The first step increases the maximum CR to 13. The second step allows you to increase the Cost to 7 to increase the maximum CR to 16.

The third step allows you to increase the Cost to 9 to increase the maximum CR to 19.

The fourth step allows you to increase the Cost to 11 to increase the maximum CR to 22.

The fifth step allows you to increase the Cost to 13 to increase the maximum CR to 25.
